name: parables
description: AI-powered Bible app with offline support

scripts.build:dev: cd frontend && rimraf android && cross-env APP_VARIANT=development npx expo prebuild --platform android --clean && (echo sdk.dir=C:/Users/user/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk && echo ndk.dir=C:/Users/user/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/ndk/27.1.12297006) > android/local.properties && cd android && .\gradlew.bat --stop && (powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 'C:\P\frontend\node_modules\expo-modules-core\android\build'" || echo cleanup done) && .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug --no-daemon
scripts.build:dev:install: npm run build:dev && npm run install:android
scripts.build:release: cd frontend && npx expo prebuild --platform android --clean && (echo sdk.dir=C:/Users/user/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk && echo ndk.dir=C:/Users/user/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk/ndk/27.1.12297006) > android/local.properties && cd android && .\gradlew.bat --stop && (powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 'C:\P\frontend\node_modules\expo-modules-core\android\build'" || echo cleanup done) && .\gradlew.bat assembleRelease --no-daemon
scripts.build:release:install: npm run build:release && npm run install:android:release
scripts.build:ios: cd frontend && cross-env EAS_NO_VCS=1 APP_VARIANT=development eas build --profile development --platform ios --clear-cache
scripts.build:all: cd frontend && cross-env EAS_NO_VCS=1 APP_VARIANT=development eas build --profile development --platform all --clear-cache
scripts.ship:rebuild: cd frontend && rimraf android ios && cross-env EAS_NO_VCS=1 eas build --profile preview --platform all --clear-cache
scripts.ship:rebuild:android: cd frontend && rimraf android && cross-env EAS_NO_VCS=1 eas build --profile preview --platform android --clear-cache
scripts.ship:rebuild:ios: cd frontend && rimraf ios && cross-env EAS_NO_VCS=1 eas build --profile preview --platform ios --clear-cache
scripts.ship:ios: cd frontend && cross-env EAS_NO_VCS=1 eas build --profile preview --platform ios --clear-cache
